Class AbstractTransactionSampler

java.lang.Object
dom.institution.lab.cns.engine.sampling.interfaces.AbstractTransactionSampler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ISowable
Direct Known Subclasses:
FileBasedTransactionSampler, StandardTransactionSampler
public abstract class AbstractTransactionSampler extends Object implements ISowable
A sampler for Transaction objects. Accepts size and value means and standard deviations and produces random samples of transactions and inter-arrival times.

  • Method Details

    • getNextTransactionArrivalInterval

      public abstract float getNextTransactionArrivalInterval() throws Exception
      Returns the next sampled transaction interval in milliseconds.
      Returns:
      The next sampled transaction interval (msec).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getNextTransactionFeeValue

      public abstract float getNextTransactionFeeValue() throws Exception
      Get a sample transaction fee value.
      Returns:
      Transaction fee value (local tokens).
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getNextTransactionSize

      public abstract long getNextTransactionSize() throws Exception
      Returns a sample of a transaction size in bytes.
      Returns:
      The generated transaction size in bytes.
      Throws:
      Exception

    • getArrivalNode

      public abstract int getArrivalNode() throws IllegalStateException
      Returns the next transaction arrival Node.

      Pulls from the file queues; if the file is exhausted, uses the alternative sampler.

      Returns:
      Node ID
      Throws:
      IllegalStateException - if the file is exhausted and no alternative sampler is defined

    • getRandomNum

      public abstract int getRandomNum(int min, int max)
      Return a random number from min to max (inclusive)
      Parameters:
      min - The minimum.
      max - The maximum.
      Returns:
      The random integer

    • getConflict

      public abstract int getConflict(int id, int N, double dispersion, double likelihood)
      Pick a random match for a given ID with distance bias controlled by alpha.
      Parameters:
      id - Target ID (1 .. N)
      N - Total number of IDs (ignored if conflict comes predefined)
      dispersion - Closeness parameter [0,1]: 0 -> almost always near 'id' 1 -> can pick anywhere in range (near edges possible) (ignored if conflict comes predefined)
      likelihood - The likelihood that the transaction has a conflict.
      Returns:
      Chosen matching ID

    • randomDependencies

      public abstract BitSet randomDependencies(int id, boolean mandatory, float dispersion, int countMean, float countSD)

    • updateSeed

      public abstract void updateSeed()
      Move to the next seed on the list

      public abstract long getSeedChangeTx()
      The transaction at which seed is automatically going to update

    • seedUpdateEnabled

      public abstract boolean seedUpdateEnabled()
      Enable seed updating

    • LoadConfig

      public void LoadConfig()
      Loads configuration values from Config for transaction sampling.

    • getTxArrivalIntervalRate

      public float getTxArrivalIntervalRate()
      Returns the transaction arrival rate (in the entire system, arriving in random nodes) in transactions per second (Tx/sec)
      Returns:
      Transaction arrival rate in Tx/sec

    • setTxArrivalIntervalRate

      public void setTxArrivalIntervalRate(float txArrivalIntervalRate)
      Sets the transaction arrival rate (in the entire system, arriving in random nodes) in transactions per second (Tx/sec)
      Parameters:
      txArrivalIntervalRate - Transaction arrival rate in Tx/sec

      Returns the mean transaction size in bytes

    • getTxFeeValueMean

      public float getTxFeeValueMean()
      Returns the mean transaction fee value.
      Returns:
      The mean transaction fee value (local tokens).

    • setTxFeeValueMean

      public void setTxFeeValueMean(float txValueMean)
      Sets the mean transaction fee value.
      Parameters:
      txValueMean - The mean transaction fee value to be set (local tokens).
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if the provided value is less than 0.

    • getTxFeeValueSD

      public float getTxFeeValueSD()
      Returns the standard deviation of transaction fee value.
      Returns:
      The standard deviation of transaction fee value (in local tokens).

    • setTxFeeValueSD

      public void setTxFeeValueSD(float txValueSD)
      Sets the standard deviation of transaction fee value.
      Parameters:
      txValueSD - The standard deviation of transaction fee value to be set.
      Throws:
      ArithmeticException - if the provided value is less than 0.
